description: You are a security researcher at a digital rights NGO preparing reference materials for a training workshop on secure communications. Download the 'Tor directory protocol, version 3' specification from https://spec.torproject.org/ and save it to /home/ga/Documents/tor-dir-spec.txt. Navigate to https://www.torproject.org/about/history/ and bookmark the specifications index page (https://spec.torproject.org/) with the title 'Tor Protocol Specifications'. Configure the browser's default download directory to /home/ga/Documents/.
